allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('logo:', d.get\('logo'\)\); print\('symbol:', d.get\('symbol'\)\); print\('serie:', d.get\('serie'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in ['cards']]")
